data.name: AlreadyVisited
data.value: {0} already visited.

data.name: Ignored
data.value: {0} ignored.

data.name: RecordStarted
data.value: {0} started.

data.name: RecordFinished
data.value: {0} finished.

data.name: CodeNotCompilable
data.value: Code is not compilable: {0}

data.name: NoStaticDataRecordFound
data.value: No static data record is found.

data.name: RecordSchemaNotFound
data.value: Record schema not found: {0}

data.name: ExceptionCountWhileCollecting
data.value: There are {0} exceptions while collecting record schema set.

data.name: RecordNotNamedTypeSymbol
data.value: {0} is not a named type symbol

data.name: ParseResultCountMismatch
data.value: Count mismatch

data.name: ParseResultParameterNotFound
data.value: {0} not found

data.name: AttributeHasNoProperty
data.value: {0} has no property.

data.name: UnsupportedExpressionType
data.value: Unsupported expression type.

data.name: ExpectedRecordCollectionType
data.value: Expected {0} to be record collection type.

data.name: NotSupportedType
data.value: {0} is not supported type.

data.name: RecordSchemaTypeArgNotFound
data.value: {0} is not found in the RecordSchemaDictionary

data.name: NullStringAttributeNotFound
data.value: Property {0} does not have a NullStringAttribute.

data.name: RangeAttributeMustHaveTwoValues
data.value: RangeAttribute must have two values.

data.name: EnumMemberNotFound
data.value: Enum member '{0}' not found on {1}.

data.name: ValueOutOfRange
data.value: Value({0}) must be between {1} and {2}.

data.name: ParameterCannotHaveLengthAttribute
data.value: Parameter {0} cannot have LengthAttribute

data.name: ParameterCannotHaveLengthAttributeWithContext
data.value: Parameter {0} cannot have LengthAttribute in the argument: {1}

data.name: DuplicateKeyInContext
data.value: Parameter {0} has duplicate key: {1} in context {2}.

data.name: InvalidDataLength
data.value: Invalid data length: {0}

data.name: InvalidCellValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' in cell {1}.

data.name: InvalidCellValueWithPattern
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' in cell {1}. Expected to match pattern '{2}'.

data.name: ValueTypeMustBeRecordPropertySchema
data.value: Value type of RecordKeyRecordValueMapSchema must be a RecordPropertySchema: {0}

data.name: ValueRecordMustHaveOneKeyMember
data.value: Value record must have exactly one [Key] member: {0}

data.name: StartIndexOutOfRange
data.value: StartIndex {0} is out of range for the provided arguments.

data.name: UnreachableCodeInCollect
data.value: Unreachable code reached in Collect method.

data.name: CannotValidateDuplicatesInNoneMode
data.value: Cannot validate duplicates when CollectMode is None: {0}

data.name: DuplicateValuesInArgument
data.value: Duplicate values found in the argument: {0}

data.name: BeginKeyScopeOnlyInKeyOnlyMode
data.value: BeginKeyScope can only be called in KeyOnly collect mode: {0}

data.name: NestedKeyScopesNotAllowed
data.value: Nested key scopes are not allowed: {0}

data.name: EndKeyScopeOnlyInKeyOnlyMode
data.value: EndKeyScope can only be called in KeyOnly collect mode: {0}

data.name: EndKeyScopeWithoutBeginKeyScope
data.value: EndKeyScope called without a matching BeginKeyScope: {0}

data.name: NoComponentsInKeyScope
data.value: No components collected in key scope: {0}

data.name: ExpectedArrayType
data.value: Expected {0} to be supported array type, but actually not supported.

data.name: NullableRecordArrayNotSupported
data.value: {0} is not supported array type. Nullable record item for array is not supported.

data.name: SingleColumnArrayOnlyPrimitive
data.value: {0} is not supported array type. SingleColumnCollectionAttribute can only be used in primitive type array.

data.name: ExpectedHashSetType
data.value: Expected {0} to be supported hashset type, but actually not supported.

data.name: NullableRecordHashSetNotSupported
data.value: {0} is not supported hashset type. Nullable record item for hashset is not supported.

data.name: SingleColumnHashSetOnlyPrimitive
data.value: {0} is not supported hashset type. SingleColumnCollectionAttribute can only be used in primitive type hashset.

data.name: ExpectedDictionaryType
data.value: Expected {0} to be supported dictionary type, but actually not supported.

data.name: DictionaryKeyMustBeNonNullable
data.value: Key type of dictionary must be non-nullable.

data.name: DictionaryValueMustBeNonNullable
data.value: Value type of dictionary must be non-nullable.

data.name: KeyAttributeRequiredInDictionaryValue
data.value: {0} is used as a value in dictionary {1}, KeyAttribute must be used in one of the parameters.

data.name: DictionaryKeyValueMustBeSameType
data.value: Key and value type of dictionary must be same type.

data.name: FileOrDirectoryNotExist
data.value: The file or directory does not exist.

data.name: NullableCollectionNotSupported
data.value: {0}({1}): nullable collection type is not supported.

data.name: KeyAttributeMustBeNonNullable
data.value: {0}({1}): parameter with KeyAttribute must be non-nullable.

data.name: StaticDataRecordMustHaveAtMostOneKey
data.value: {0}: StaticDataRecord must have at most one [Key] member. Composite key is not supported; use a record key instead.

data.name: DateTimeFormatAttributeNotApplicable
data.value: {0}({1}): DateTime is not applicable, so DateTimeFormatAttribute cannot be used.

data.name: DateTimeFormatAttributeRequired
data.value: {0}({1}): DateTime type must use DateTimeFormatAttribute.

data.name: LengthAttributeRequired
data.value: {0}({1}): collection type must use LengthAttribute.

data.name: NullStringAttributeRequiredForNullable
data.value: {0}({1}): nullable type must use NullStringAttribute.

data.name: NullStringAttributeRequiredForNullableArray
data.value: {0}({1}): nullable primitive array type must use NullStringAttribute.

data.name: NullStringAttributeRequiredForNullableSet
data.value: {0}({1}): nullable primitive set type must use NullStringAttribute.

data.name: NullStringAttributeRequiredForNullableMap
data.value: {0}({1}): nullable primitive map type must use NullStringAttribute.

data.name: NullStringAttributeNotAllowed
data.value: {0}({1}): not a nullable or nullable-containing collection, so NullStringAttribute cannot be used.

data.name: RegularExpressionAttributeOnlyForString
data.value: {0}({1}): not a string, so RegularExpressionAttribute cannot be used.

data.name: CountRangeAttributeOnlyForSingleColumnCollection
data.value: CountRangeAttribute can only be used with SingleColumnCollectionAttribute.

data.name: CountRangeAndLengthMutuallyExclusive
data.value: CountRangeAttribute and LengthAttribute cannot be used together.

data.name: CountRangeMinMustBePositive
data.value: CountRangeAttribute MinCount must be greater than 0. A MinCount of 0 imposes no lower-bound constraint.

data.name: CountOutOfRange
data.value: Cell {0} contains {1} item(s), but {2} expects between {3} and {4}.

data.name: SingleColumnCollectionNotForUnsupportedCollection
data.value: {0}({1}): not a supported collection, so SingleColumnCollectionAttribute cannot be used.

data.name: SingleColumnCollectionNotForMap
data.value: {0}({1}): SingleColumnCollectionAttribute cannot be used with Map collection.

data.name: FkSwitchFkConflict
data.value: {0}: ForeignKeyAttribute and SwitchForeignKeyAttribute cannot be used together on the same parameter.

data.name: SwitchForeignKeyDuplicateCondition
data.value: {0}: SwitchForeignKeyAttribute has duplicate condition (Column={1}, Value={2}). Each condition value must map to a single target.

data.name: TimeSpanFormatAttributeNotApplicable
data.value: {0}({1}): TimeSpan is not applicable, so TimeSpanFormatAttribute cannot be used.

data.name: TimeSpanFormatAttributeRequired
data.value: {0}({1}): TimeSpan type must use TimeSpanFormatAttribute.

data.name: FileSchemaNotFound
data.value: {0} is not supported type.

data.name: InvalidCellValueForEnum
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' in cell {1}. Expected a member of {2}.

data.name: SingleColumnCellCountMismatch
data.value: Cell {0} contains {1} value(s), but {2} expects {3}.

data.name: SingleColumnCellEmptyValue
data.value: Cell {0} contains an empty value for {1}.

data.name: CompileErrorsOccurred
data.value: {0} compile errors occurred.

data.name: NotSupportedRecordType
data.value: {0} is not supported record type.

data.name: NotSupportedRecordTypeWithMessage
data.value: {0} is not supported record type. {1}

data.name: NotFoundInRecordSchemaDictionary
data.value: {0} is not found in the record schema dictionary.

data.name: NotSupportedCollectionType
data.value: {0} is not supported collection type.

data.name: NotSupportedPrimitiveType
data.value: {0} is not supported primitive type.

data.name: NotSupportedPropertyType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported property type.

data.name: FactoryNotSupportedPrimitiveType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported primitive type.

data.name: NotSupportedListType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported list type.

data.name: NotSingleColumnList
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a single column list.

data.name: NotSupportedHashSetType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported hash set type.

data.name: NotSingleColumnHashSet
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a single column hash set.

data.name: FactoryNotSupportedArrayType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported array type.

data.name: IsRecordArrayType
data.value: {0}({1}) is record array type.

data.name: NotSupportedNestedCollectionType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported nested collection type.

data.name: FactoryDictionaryKeyMustBeRecordType
data.value: {0}({1}) Key type of dictionary must be a supported record type.

data.name: FactoryDictionaryValueMustBeRecordType
data.value: {0}({1}) Value type of dictionary must be a supported record type.

data.name: FactoryDictionaryKeyMustBePrimitiveType
data.value: {0}({1}) Key type of dictionary must be a supported primitive type.

data.name: FactoryNotSupportedRecordType
data.value: {0}({1}) is not a supported record type.

data.name: IsRecordHashSetType
data.value: {0}({1}) is record hash set type.

data.name: InvalidFullName
data.value: fullName should not be null, empty, or end with '.'
